We Hosted Students from the Earthquake Region at the YKS Camp This Year

01.08.2023

Organised by our university for the second time this year, YKS Academic Preparation Camp and Art, Sports and Culture Camp hosted earthquake survivor students.

Students who received pre-preparation training for the university entrance exam; They also experienced campus life by participating in activities such as excursions, sports activities, various workshops and open-air cinema. Last year, students from 80 provinces participated in the camps, and this year all quota was reserved for earthquake victims. A total of 300 students from 11 provinces benefited from the camp completely free of charge, and the students were accommodated in the dormitories of our University.

After a 6-week productive camp programme, our Rector Prof. Dr. Atilla Arkan, Secretary General Sebahattin Belik and Deputy Secretary General Kemal Sarı gave their certificates to the students on Friday, 28 July.
